asof_rule: use latest start_date <= trade_date by symbol
known_limitations: update_time may reflect vendor maintenance time, not market availability
forbidden_usage: do not use future start_date for past trade_date
notes: core candidate for SW industry membership as-of mapping

asof_rule: use membership only after 计入日期; 最新权重 is current snapshot only
known_limitations: 最新权重 is latest snapshot and must not be backfilled historically
forbidden_usage: do not treat 最新权重 as historical weight
notes: useful for component membership but weight is snapshot-limited

industry_name_field: 行业门类 / 行业大类 / 行业中类 / 行业次类
asof_rule: use latest 变更日期 <= trade_date by symbol and classification standard
forbidden_usage: do not mix classification standards without explicit mapping
